transcript: Speaker A (AI): ಏನ್ ಮಾಡ್ತಿದ್ದೀರಾ ಅಣ್ಣ? [What are you doing, brother?] Speaker B (Human): I am glass cleaning. Speaker A (AI): hahaha... "glass cleaning" ಅಲ್ಲ ಅಣ್ಣ, "I am cleaning the glass" ಅಂತ ಹೇಳ್ಬೇಕು. [hahaha... not "glass cleaning" brother, you should say "I am cleaning the glass".] Speaker B (Human): ಓಹ್... ನನ್ನ English ತುಂಬಾ weak ಇದೆ. [Oh... my English is very weak.] Speaker A (AI): ಪರವಾಗಿಲ್ಲ ಅಣ್ಣ, ದಿನಾ ನನ್ ಜೊತೆ 15 ನಿಮಿಷ practice ಮಾಡಿದ್ರೆ easy ಆಗಿ English ಮಾತಾಡಬಹುದು. [No problem brother, if you practice with me for 15 minutes daily, you can speak English easily.] Speaker B (Human): ಆದರೆ ನಾನು full day ಕೆಲಸದಲ್ಲೇ busy ಇರ್ತೀನಿ. [But I am busy with work the full day.] Speaker A (AI): ನೀವು ಕೆಲಸ ಮಾಡ್ತಾನೆ short lessons ಮೂಲಕ English ಕಲಿಯಬಹುದು. [You can learn English through short lessons while working.] Speaker B (Human): ಅದಕ್ಕೆ fees ಜಾಸ್ತಿ ಇರುತ್ತಾ? [Will the fees be high for that?] Speaker A (AI): ಇಲ್ಲ ಅಣ್ಣ... ಕೇವಲ ಒಂದು ರೂಪಾಯಿಯಿಂದ ಶುರು ಮಾಡಬಹುದು. ಅದಕ್ಕೆ ಈಗಾಗಲೇ ಒಂದು ಕೋಟಿ ಜನ Mysivi ನಲ್ಲಿ English practice ಮಾಡ್ತಿದ್ದಾರೆ. [No brother... you can start with just one rupee. That's why already one crore people are practicing English on Mysivi.] Speaker B (Human): Super... ನಾನು ಹೇಗೆ join ಆಗೋದು? [Super... how do I join?] Speaker A (AI): ಕೆಳಗಿರುವ install button ಒತ್ತಿ Mysivi app install ಮಾಡಿ, ಇಂದೇ ನಿಮ್ಮ English journey start ಮಾಡಿ. [Press the install button below, install the Mysivi app, and start your English journey today.]
on_screen_text: ಏನ್ ಮಾಡ್ತಿದ್ದೀರಾ [What are you doing] ಅಣ್ಣಾ [Brother] I am glass cleaning hahaha... "glass [hahaha... "glass] ಅಣ್ಣಾ... "I am cleaning [Brother... "I am cleaning] ಹೇಳ್ಬೇಕು [should say] ಓಹ್... ನನ್ನ English [Oh... my English] ತುಂಬಾ weak ಇದೆ [is very weak] ಪರವಾಗಿಲ್ಲ ಅಣ್ಣಾ... [No problem brother...] ದಿನಾ ನನ್ ಜೊತೆ [daily with me] 15 MINUTES ಹದಿನೈದು ನಿಮ್ಮ [fifteen your] practice ಮಾಡಿದ್ರೆ [if you practice] easy ಆಗಿ English [easily English] ಮಾತಾಡಬಹುದು [can speak] ಆದರೆ ನಾನು full [But I full] day ಕೆಲಸದಲ್ಲೇ [day in work] busy ಇರ್ತೀನಿ [will be busy] ನೀವು ಕೆಲಸ ಮಾಡ್ತಾನೆ [You while working] short lessons [short lessons] ಮೂಲಕ English [through English] ಕಲಿಯಬಹುದು [can learn] ಅದಕ್ಕೆ fees ಜಾಸ್ತಿ [for that fees high] ಇರುತ್ತಾ [will it be] ಇಲ್ಲ ಅಣ್ಣಾ... ಕೇವಲ [No brother... only] 1 RUPEE ಒಂದು ರೂಪಾಯಿಯಿಂದ [from one rupee] ಶುರು ಮಾಡಬಹುದು [can start] ಅದಕ್ಕೆ ಈಗಾಗಲೇ [for that already] ಒಂದು ಕೋಟಿ ಜನ Mysivi [one crore people Mysivi] ನಲ್ಲಿ English [in English] practice ಮಾಡ್ತಿದ್ದಾರೆ [are practicing] Super... ನಾನು ಹೇಗೆ [Super... how do I] join ಆಗೋದು [join] ಕೆಳಗಿರುವ install [below install] Mysivi app install [Mysivi app install] ಇಂದೇ ನಿಮ್ಮ English [today your English] journey start [journey start] ಮಾಡಿ [do]
summary: An AI avatar corrects a window cleaner's English grammar in a split-screen video. The avatar promotes the Mysivi app, highlighting short daily lessons starting at 1 rupee. The ad ends with a call to action to install the app.
